comment:
$$16^x-2\cdot 4^{x+1}=t\\ t^2+23t+112\geq 0\\ (t+7)(t+16)\geq 0$$
$$\displaystyle \begin{array}{{>{\displaystyle}l}} \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \ \left[ \begin{array}{l l} t\leq -16\\ t\geq -7 \end{array} \right.\\ \left[ \begin{array}{l l} 16^{x} -2\cdotp 4^{x+1} +16\leq 0\\ 16^{x} -2\cdotp 4^{x+1} +7\geq 0 \end{array} \right. \end{array}$$
$$16^x-2\cdot 4^{x+1}+16\leq 0\\ 4^x=k,k>0\\ k^2-8k+16\leq 0\\ (k-4)^2\leq 0\\ k=4\Rightarrow 4^x=4\Rightarrow x=1\\ 16^x-2\cdot 4^{x+1}+7\geq 0\\ 4^x=k,k>0\\ k^2-8k+7\geq 0\\ (k-7)(k-1)\geq 0$$
$$\displaystyle \begin{array}{{>{\displaystyle}l}} \left[ \begin{array}{l l} \begin{cases} k >0\\ k\leq 1 \end{cases}\\ k\geq 7 \end{array} \right.\\ \left[ \begin{array}{l l} \begin{cases} 4^{x} >0\\ 4^{x} \leq 4^{0} \end{cases}\\ 4^{x} \geq 7 \end{array} \right.\\ \left[ \begin{array}{l l} x\leq 0\\ x\geq \log_{4} 7 \end{array} \right. \end{array}$$
$$x\in (-\infty;0]\cup [\log_47;+\infty)$$
Ответ: \(x\in ( -\infty ;0] \cup \ [\log_{4} 7;+\infty )\).
